TrendFollow_BTC_1h.reason: WF DEGRADING, OOS negative despite positive full-range

TrendFollow_ETH.reason: Full 90d net=-11%, OOS barely positive (+2.27% in 1 window), insufficient evidence for enabling

TrendFollow_BTC.reason: Only 1 WF window with limited 30d data — BROKEN verdict unreliable. Full 30d net=+17.88% is solid. Monitor closely.

critical_finding.title: 30d vs 90d window discrepancy — extreme recency bias detected
critical_finding.detail: Athena's 30-day backtest window (late May to late June 2026) massively overstates strategy performance vs 90-day full range. TrendFollow_BTC_1h: 30d=+83% vs 90d=+13%. TrendFollow_ETH: 30d=+100% vs 90d=-11%. Recent market regime was exceptionally favorable for trend-following.
critical_finding.recommendation: Athena should use >=60 day windows. 30 days is insufficient and produces misleading results during trending markets.

enabled_strategies.TrendFollow_BTC: enabled (15m, EMA=75, SL=1%, TP=1.5%, CD=10) — full=+17.88%, WF inconclusive (1 window)

ema_sweep_summary.btc_1h: EMA=50 is optimal (net=+12.66% sharpe=+0.37), no EMA beats WF DEGRADING
ema_sweep_summary.eth_1h: EMA=30 SL=2% TP=4% is best (net=-0.34%), still near-zero overall, no viable config found
